name: Operation.ReportParameters
summary: Represents the parameters required for generating a report.

constructors.name: Operation.ReportParameters
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Operation.ReportParameters class

properties.name: FileName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the created report. The name must contain more than three characters.

properties.name: IsFromSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the report is from selected or from all objects.

properties.name: TemplateName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the report template to be used in report creation. The name must contain more than three characters.

properties.name: Title1
properties.summary: Gets or sets the first title for the created report.

properties.name: Title2
properties.summary: Gets or sets the second title for the created report.

properties.name: Title3
properties.summary: Gets or sets the third title for the created report.

properties.name: XLSXFlags
properties.summary: Gets or sets the flags used for processing XLSX files.

properties.name: XLTXFileName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Excel template to be used.
